contentList.content: Your Clubs, Glaives, Greatclubs, Warhammers, Javelins, Maces, Morningstars, Pikes, Quarterstaffs, Sickles, Spears or Tridents becomes magical: they deal [1], and use your <LSTag Tooltip="SpellcastingAbilityModifier">Spellcasting Ability</LSTag> for <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Rolls</LSTag>.

Your Club, Quarterstaff, Mace, Morningstar, Sickle, Spear, or Trident becomes magical: they deal [1], and add your <LSTag Tooltip="SpellcastingAbilityModifier">Spellcasting Ability</LSTag> for <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Rolls</LSTag>.
Creature's weapon is magical and deals [1]. <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Rolls</LSTag> add the wielder's <LSTag Tooltip="SpellcastingAbilityModifier">Spellcasting Ability Modifier</LSTag>.
Your summoned weapon uses your <LSTag Tooltip="SpellcastingAbilityModifier">Spellcasting Ability</LSTag> for <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Rolls</LSTag>.

Your hand becomes a necrotic weapon. Make a melee attack, and then until Long Rest, gain a Bonus Action attack that deals necrotic damage and saps life force to heal you for one-third of the damage done.
Until Long Rest, you can use Vampiric Touch again as a Bonus Action.

Shield yourself with Necrotic energy. You gain Temporary Hitpoints and, as long as those Temporary Hitpoints remain, you gain resistance to Necrotic damage and Damage Reduction equal to half the level of the spell slot used, rounding up.
A protective torrent provides +1 AC and resistance to Fire damage.
Barkskin provides AC 16 protection, modest damage reduction, and Resistance to Bludgeoning damage.
Stoneskin provides AC 18 protection, improved damage reduction, and Resistance to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage.
Shield of Faith protects a creature from harm. Increase AC by 1 and gain resistance to Radiant damage.
Protected by Shield of Faith, increasing AC by 1 and resistance to Radiant damage.
